## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SmithAI and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, article refreshes, and image creation for blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/LRZ2epeqycq3wqBGotxabNhSx5BSg1aV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content imagery needs to align closely with SmithAI's brand; current proposals are too aggressive and need refinement](https://fathom.video/share/LRZ2epeqycq3wqBGotxabNhSx5BSg1aV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Article refreshes should focus on virtual receptionist topics, prioritizing older content for updates](https://fathom.video/share/LRZ2epeqycq3wqBGotxabNhSx5BSg1aV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [New content production should emphasize AI receptionist topics](https://fathom.video/share/LRZ2epeqycq3wqBGotxabNhSx5BSg1aV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Industry-specific software content strategy needs refinement, focusing on clarity and relevance for target businesses](https://fathom.video/share/LRZ2epeqycq3wqBGotxabNhSx5BSg1aV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Content Imagery Review

  - [Elvis presented custom-created cover images for blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/LRZ2epeqycq3wqBGotxabNhSx5BSg1aV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Maddy expressed concerns about brand alignment and suggested:](https://fathom.video/share/LRZ2epeqycq3wqBGotxabNhSx5BSg1aV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
      - [Avoiding elements like the green checkerboard phone](https://fathom.video/share/LRZ2epeqycq3wqBGotxabNhSx5BSg1aV?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
      - [Being cautious with AI-generated images](https://fathom.video/share/LRZ2epeqycq3wqBGotxabNhSx5BSg1aV?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
      - [Focusing on text-heavy designs rather than prominent visuals](https://fathom.video/share/LRZ2epeqycq3wqBGotxabNhSx5BSg1aV?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
      - [Using stock images previously approved for the brand](https://fathom.video/share/LRZ2epeqycq3wqBGotxabNhSx5BSg1aV?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [Decision: Revert to using existing approved imagery or create more conservative, text-focused designs](https://fathom.video/share/LRZ2epeqycq3wqBGotxabNhSx5BSg1aV?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)

### Article Refresh Strategy

  - [Discussed 10 potential articles for refreshing](https://fathom.video/share/LRZ2epeqycq3wqBGotxabNhSx5BSg1aV?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
  - [Maddy requested additional information for review:](https://fathom.video/share/LRZ2epeqycq3wqBGotxabNhSx5BSg1aV?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
      - [Current ranking](https://fathom.video/share/LRZ2epeqycq3wqBGotxabNhSx5BSg1aV?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
      - [Search volume](https://fathom.video/share/LRZ2epeqycq3wqBGotxabNhSx5BSg1aV?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
      - [Last update date](https://fathom.video/share/LRZ2epeqycq3wqBGotxabNhSx5BSg1aV?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
      - [Proposed changes and their potential impact](https://fathom.video/share/LRZ2epeqycq3wqBGotxabNhSx5BSg1aV?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
  - [Focus areas:](https://fathom.video/share/LRZ2epeqycq3wqBGotxabNhSx5BSg1aV?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
      - [Prioritize virtual receptionist topics for refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/LRZ2epeqycq3wqBGotxabNhSx5BSg1aV?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
      - [Target the 10 oldest posts for updates](https://fathom.video/share/LRZ2epeqycq3wqBGotxabNhSx5BSg1aV?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
      - [Avoid minor updates (e.g., adding 2 new tools) unlikely to impact rankings](https://fathom.video/share/LRZ2epeqycq3wqBGotxabNhSx5BSg1aV?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
  - [Approved "What is a virtual receptionist?" for immediate refresh](https://fathom.video/share/LRZ2epeqycq3wqBGotxabNhSx5BSg1aV?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)

### New Content Production Strategy

  - [Proposed focusing on industry-specific software articles](https://fathom.video/share/LRZ2epeqycq3wqBGotxabNhSx5BSg1aV?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
  - [Recommendations from Maddy:](https://fathom.video/share/LRZ2epeqycq3wqBGotxabNhSx5BSg1aV?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
      - [Target larger businesses (20+ employees) rather than small side gigs](https://fathom.video/share/LRZ2epeqycq3wqBGotxabNhSx5BSg1aV?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)
      - [Use Housecall Pro and Service Titan as reference for content style and topics](https://fathom.video/share/LRZ2epeqycq3wqBGotxabNhSx5BSg1aV?tab=summary&timestamp=1581.0)
      - [Prioritize clarity over clever wording in titles](https://fathom.video/share/LRZ2epeqycq3wqBGotxabNhSx5BSg1aV?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)
      - [Consider expanding existing industry pages instead of creating new blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/LRZ2epeqycq3wqBGotxabNhSx5BSg1aV?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Action: Elvis to analyze Housecall Pro and Service Titan's content structure and keywords](https://fathom.video/share/LRZ2epeqycq3wqBGotxabNhSx5BSg1aV?tab=summary&timestamp=1737.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Elvis to gather additional info (current rank, search volume, last update) for article refresh candidates](https://fathom.video/share/LRZ2epeqycq3wqBGotxabNhSx5BSg1aV?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [Elvis to create more conservative image designs using stock imagery or text-focused layouts](https://fathom.video/share/LRZ2epeqycq3wqBGotxabNhSx5BSg1aV?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [Team to refocus article refresh efforts on virtual receptionist topics and older content](https://fathom.video/share/LRZ2epeqycq3wqBGotxabNhSx5BSg1aV?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [Elvis to analyze Housecall Pro and Service Titan's content for industry-specific software article strategy](https://fathom.video/share/LRZ2epeqycq3wqBGotxabNhSx5BSg1aV?tab=summary&timestamp=1737.0)
  - [Maddy to review drafted articles and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/LRZ2epeqycq3wqBGotxabNhSx5BSg1aV?tab=summary&timestamp=1763.0)
  - [Team to refine the industry-specific software content strategy based on discussion](https://fathom.video/share/LRZ2epeqycq3wqBGotxabNhSx5BSg1aV?tab=summary&timestamp=1737.0)
